title: Entity Page Recipe (Meta-Schema)
description: Meta-schema for per-entity-type page recipes. Each entity_type has its own recipe file at ui_contract/entity_pages/<type>.json that conforms to THIS schema. The UI layer reads the recipe at render time and instantiates section components in declared order with declared config. See ADR-007 for design.

version.description: Recipe semver. Bump when section order/config changes meaningfully.

id.description: Section component identifier. Closed enum for v0.1.0; extends with controlled deprecation cycle.

order.description: Render order. Sections sorted ascending by this value.

config.description: Free-form section config. Component is responsible for validating its own config; this schema does not constrain.

render_only_if_present.description: If true, section is omitted when its underlying data field is empty/absent.

default_lang_fallback.description: Language fallback chain for label rendering when current UI lang label is absent. Default ['tr', 'en', 'ar', 'translit'].
